---
title: "Resources"
description: "Categorized research materials, conference summaries, and technical learning resources."
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="../assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---


## E-Books

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [Practical Deep Learning (Fast.ai)](https://course.fast.ai/){.stretched-link}
Fast.ai's top-tier practical course for applying Deep Learning to real problems.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Automating GIS Processes](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/){.stretched-link}
Python-based course for automating geospatial analysis with Geopandas.
:::


:::


## Online Courses

::: {.software-grid}


::: {.resource-card}
### [NASA ARSET](https://appliedsciences.nasa.gov/what-we-do/capacity-building/arset){.stretched-link}
Applied Remote SEnsing Training program for learning RS technologies.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [The State of Satellites](https://landscape.satsummit.io/){.stretched-link}
A guide to current satellite remote sensing technology and and apply it.
:::

:::


## Workshops

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [ML for Remote Sensing (ICLR 2023)](ml-remote-sensing.qmd){.stretched-link}
Detailed breakdown of the Machine Learning for Remote Sensing workshop at ICLR 2023.
:::

:::

## Python Programming

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://openscapes.org/images/logo/openscapes_hex_badge.png){.resource-img}](https://boettiger-lab.github.io/nasa-topst-env-justice/){.stretched-link}
### [Cloud Native Geospatial in R & Python](https://boettiger-lab.github.io/nasa-topst-env-justice/)
Cloud-native workflows for environmental justice research using R and Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/images/cover_sits_book_quarto.png){.resource-img}](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/){.stretched-link}
### [SITS: Satellite Image Time Series](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/)
Analysis of Earth Observation Data Cubes using the sits R package and Python utilities.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Python Programming (Gyansetu)](https://gyansetu-python.gitbook.io/python-programming){.stretched-link}
A comprehensive guide to Python programming from the Gyansetu project.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AllenDowney/ThinkPython/v3/think_python_3e.jpg){.resource-img}](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkPython/){.stretched-link}
### [Think Python](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkPython/)
The classic introduction to Python programming by Allen B. Downey.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Intro to Stats with Python](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkStats/){.stretched-link}
Introduction to statistics and probability using Python (Think Stats).
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://pypod.github.io/assets/images/logo.png){.resource-img}](https://pypod.github.io/){.stretched-link}
### [Programming in Python (IIT)](https://pypod.github.io/)
IIT Madras course materials for programming and data structures in Python.
:::

:::


## Extra

::: {.software-grid}


::: {.resource-card}
### [Cloud-Based RS with GEE](https://www.eefabook.org/){.stretched-link}
The fundamental book for learning Google Earth Engine (EEFA Book).
:::
